name: MALIBU BOATS, INC.
business: The company designs, manufactures, and markets recreational powerboats including performance sport boats, sterndrive and outboard boats under eight brands: Malibu, Axis, Pursuit, Maverick, Cobia, Pathfinder, Hewes, and Cobalt. It sells its boats through a dealer network of over 325 dealer locations globally. The boats are used for water sports, general recreational boating, and fishing.

exposures.sentence: We are a leading designer, manufacturer and marketer of a diverse range of recreational powerboats, including performance sport boats, sterndrive and outboard boats under eight brands Malibu, Axis, Pursuit, Maverick, Cobia, Pathfinder, Hewes and Cobalt.

tamClaims.claim: During calendar year 2024, retail sales of new recreational powerboats in the United States totaled $15.5 billion.
tamClaims.sentence: During calendar year 2024, retail sales of new recreational powerboats in the United States totaled $15.5 billion.

tamClaims.claim: Addressable market of nearly $12.6 billion in retail sales through our Malibu, Axis, Pursuit, Maverick Boat Group brands and Cobalt brands.
tamClaims.sentence: Of the recreational powerboat categories defined and tracked by the NMMA, we serve three of the top four categories consisting of outboard, sterndrive and performance sport boat representing an addressable market of nearly $12.6 billion in retail sales through our Malibu, Axis, Pursuit, Maverick Boat Group brands and Cobalt brands.
